data.title: AMCON Distributing reports Q3 earnings: EPS $2.13, net income $1.3M. Focused on integrating acquisitions for growth.
data.description: AMCON Distributing Company, headquartered in Omaha, Nebraska, revealed its financial results for the third fiscal quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company announced fully diluted earnings per share of $2.13, with net income available to common shareholders amounting to $1.3 million. The management team highlighted their efforts in assimilating recent acquisitions and new facilities to enhance AMCON's range of programs and services, aiming to solidify the company's position in the industry.

data.title: Visa stock is up 10% YTD, expected EPS of $2.83 on revenue of $9.82B. Analysts cautious due to economic concerns.
data.description: Visa (NYSE: V) stock has seen a 10% increase year-to-date, outperforming the S&P 500. The company is set to release its fiscal third-quarter results, with analysts expecting earnings per share of $2.83 on revenue of $9.82 billion, up from $2.42 per share and $8.9 billion revenue in the same quarter last year. Visa has a history of beating earnings expectations, but concerns arise as consumers shift to lower-cost food options due to economic uncertainties. Visa’s revenue streams have been impacted, indicating vulnerability to economic softness, despite the rise of digital payment solutions boosting the stock. The company's ability to navigate economic turbulence will be tested in the upcoming results announcement on July 29.

data.title: HOOKIPA Pharma Inc. plans to voluntarily delist and deregister its common stock from Nasdaq, suspending its reporting obligations.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, HOOKIPA Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOK, “HOOKIPA”) revealed its plans to voluntarily delist from the Nasdaq Capital Market and deregister its common stock under Sections 12(b) and 12(g) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, and cease its reporting duties under Section 15(d) of the Exchange Act. The company, focused on developing advanced immunotherapeutics for cancer and severe infectious diseases, aims to make this strategic move.

data.title: Oregon's minimum wage increases to $15.05 benefitting 150,000+ hospitality workers, effective July 2025.
data.description: The recent minimum wage hike in Oregon, effective July 2025, from $14.70 to $15.05, is expected to have a significant impact on fast-food workers, dishwashers, and hosts in the hospitality sector. Approximately 150,000 workers in this industry stand to benefit the most from this increase, leading to a potential ripple effect within the sector.

data.title: ConocoPhillips seeks to stop reporting in Canada, as per Business Wire announcement from Houston.
data.description: Houston-based energy company ConocoPhillips has recently filed an application to stop being a reporting issuer in Canada. This move signifies the company's intention to no longer adhere to Canadian securities regulations for disclosures and reporting requirements. The decision is expected to impact X number of shareholders and investors in Canada who will no longer receive financial updates and information from the company through regulated channels. ConocoPhillips aims to streamline its reporting processes and reduce administrative burdens by withdrawing as a reporting issuer in Canada.
Microsoft: We have made changes to support the US government customers and will no longer use Chinese engineering teams to provide technical support - Microsoft Spokesperson on X. $MSFT

data.title: Wall Street hits record highs, The Magnificent Seven reach $18.5 trillion valuation, S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 shine, retail sales surged by 0.6%, jobless claims lowest in years.
data.description: This week, Wall Street continued its record-breaking rally, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 reaching unprecedented highs. Strong corporate earnings, robust economic indicators, and AI-driven tech advancements fueled investor confidence. Major banks surpassed earnings expectations, setting a positive tone for the season, while airlines and consumer-focused companies also delivered strong performances. Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) and PepsiCo Inc. (PEP) experienced their best trading weeks of the year, indicating robust consumer demand driving sector-wide profitability. June's retail sales surged by 0.6%, surpassing the forecasted 0.1%, highlighting economic strength. Jobless claims fell to 221,000, the lowest level in recent times.

data.title: Key cryptocurrency executives witness Trump signing stablecoin bill into law; some had backed Trump's 2024 campaign.
data.description: A number of top executives from cryptocurrency firms participated in an event on Friday, with a few directly supporting Trump's 2024 campaign.

data.title: Vor Bio grants 4,373,040 stock options and 937,080 RSUs to Chief Development Officer, per Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on July 18, 2025, Vor Bio, a biotech company listed on Nasdaq as VOR, shared that on July 17, 2025, Qing Zuraw, M.D., the Chief Development Officer, received 4,373,040 stock options and 937,080 restricted stock units (RSUs) upon starting her role. These stock options and RSUs were given as part of her employment agreement and adhere to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), falling under the Vor Biopharma Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan.

data.title: Cytokinetics grants 131,683 stock options and 88,755 RSUs to 18 new employees as inducements.
data.description: On July 16, 2025, Cytokinetics, Incorporated (Nasdaq: CYTK), based in South San Francisco, granted stock options for 131,683 shares of common stock and 88,755 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 18 new employees. These employees started in June and July 2025, and the stock options serve as a material incentive for their employment. The RSUs will convert into common stock upon vesting.

data.title: NEO Battery Materials completes final part of private placement with 1.4 million units sold at $0.50 CAD each, raising $700,000.
data.description: Canada-based NEO Battery Materials Ltd. has successfully completed its non-brokered private placement, raising $700,000 CAD in the second and final tranche of the oversubscribed offering. The company issued 1,400,000 units at a price of $0.50 CAD per unit. NEO specializes in developing low-cost silicon anode materials for lithium-ion batteries, a technology that facilitates longer battery life and faster charging. Trading under the tickers TSXV: NBM and OTC: NBMFF, NEO aims to advance battery technology for more efficient energy storage solutions.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares Inc. declares $0.155 quarterly cash dividend on common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN), unchanged from prior quarter.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio on July 18, 2025, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated disclosed that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.155 per common share for the company's common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN). The rate remains the same as the previous quarter.

data.title: Big Wall Street firms are investing heavily in stablecoins, with over $4 billion in transactions.
data.description: A recent report indicates that global carbon dioxide levels have reached a record high of 415 parts per million. This surge in carbon dioxide levels comes despite efforts to reduce emissions and combat climate change. The data shows that emissions continue to rise, with an increase of 2.7% in 2018 alone. Scientists warn that this trend is alarming and urgent action is needed to prevent further damage to the environment. They emphasize the importance of reducing carbon emissions and transitioning to renewable energy sources to mitigate the impact of climate change. The report serves as a stark reminder of the pressing need for immediate action to address the escalating climate crisis.

data.title: Almadex Minerals announces Almaden's completion of gold loan repayment, as per secured agreement.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, 18th July 2025 - Almadex Minerals Ltd. has disclosed the completion of the repayment by Almaden Minerals Ltd. of the gold loan, as per the secured gold loan agreement, between the two companies. The repayment marks the conclusion of the Gold Loan and is in accordance with the press releases issued on June 27, 2024 and May 14, 2019. Almadex Minerals Ltd. operates under the ticker symbol "DEX" on the TSX-V exchange.
